text.content:
Follower Rules

In WFRP4e, hirelings and henchmen are NPCs employed by adventurers for support between and during adventures. This module treats the Followers tab as a lightweight management sheet for that support structure.

Hirelings

  • Hirelings are temporary, task-specific, or group-based support NPCs.
  • Examples include guards, porters, servants, mercenaries, and specialists hired for a job.
  • Hirelings have no hard cap in this module, but they are still expected to be affordable and manageable in play.

Henchmen

  • Henchmen are more personal long-term retainers or companions.
  • They should usually be tracked individually rather than as a group.
  • Default henchman limit equals the owning character's Fellowship Bonus.
  • That limit can be overridden on the Followers tab when needed.

V1 Tracking

  • Followers tab currently supports drag-and-drop actor assignment into Hirelings and Henchmen tables.
  • Hirelings may contain any number of actor entries.
  • Henchmen may contain actor entries up to current limit.
  • Wage is tracked as free text in v1.
  • Loyalty is tracked as a simple rating in v1.

Scope

  • The module records recruitment and management details for followers.
  • It is intended to support pay, assignment, and between-adventure bookkeeping first.
  • Advanced mechanics such as combat automation, encumbrance handling, injury rules, morale testing, and advancement are outside current v1 scope.

Design Direction

Goal is to keep follower management fast, readable, and easy to maintain directly from owning character sheet.
